MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nora M. Nachtsheim for defendant and moving party: Granite Construction, Inc.
Elizabeth Williams for defendant and opposing party: Catellus Corporation, Thrid and King Investors, City and County of San Francisco and Webcor Builders, Inc.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Granite Construction Inc. 's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and request for admissions and for an order to permit post-arbitration discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants are ordered to provide verified responses within 14 days of notice of this order. The Court orders that the time for all parties to complete discovery is extended until 30 days before trial. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
